pi_items.verified_value: A.11.2.8 is 'Unattended User Equipment'; 'Clear Desk and Clear Screen' is control A.11.2.9

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic compliance data created by SQL inserts in an Eramba GRC system. The metadata contains a factual error: control A.11.2.8 in ISO 27001:2013 is actually titled 'Unattended User Equipment', not 'Clear Desk and Clear Screen' (which is control A.11.2.9). The expected status codes [1, 'Compliant', 'Pass', 'Yes'] and required evidence strings ['Workstation Security_v2', '900s'] are task-specific requirements not derived from the ISO 27001 standard. The expected review date of 2026-06-30 matches the task requirements.
